meta.title: Wager — Prediction Market on Arc Testnet
meta.description: Create a market, take a position, pocket your winnings — all on-chain, settled in USDC on Arc Testnet.

footer.disclaimer: Wager — MVP on Arc Testnet · Test USDC only, no real value

home.subtitle: Stake your view, claim your winnings — settled in USDC, onchain.
home.emptySubtitle: Be the first to create one!
home.title: Every wager tells the future.

dataError.title: Couldn't load markets
dataError.body: The Arc Testnet RPC didn't respond in time. This can happen under rate limiting — try again.

detail.actionBody: this market has ended. As its creator, you must declare the outcome.
detail.waiting: Waiting for the market creator to declare the outcome.

bet.title: Place a bet
bet.steps: Step 1: approve USDC · Step 2: confirm the bet

claim.nothing: Nothing to claim on this market. Better luck next time!

resolve.title: Resolve market
resolve.warning: ⚠️ This action is final. Winners will be able to claim their rewards immediately afterwards.
resolve.warningAdmin: ⚠️ The creator hasn't proposed a resolution. As the contract owner, you can propose one on their behalf — this still opens a dispute window before it's final.

create.title: Create a market
create.question: Question
create.endHelp: After this date, no one can bet anymore and you will be able to resolve the market.

config.title: Contract not configured
config.body: Deploy the contract (see the README), then set NEXT_PUBLIC_MARKET_ADDRESS and NEXT_PUBLIC_USDC_ADDRESS in web/.env.local and restart the server.

myMarkets.title: My markets
myMarkets.pendingAlert: {count, plural, one {# market awaiting resolution} other {# markets awaiting resolution}}
myMarkets.pendingHint: — click an ended market to declare its outcome.
myMarkets.connectBody: To see the markets you created and your bets, connect your wallet first.
myMarkets.emptyCreated: You haven't created any markets yet
myMarkets.emptyBets: You haven't placed any bets yet
myMarkets.emptyHint: Head to the homepage to get started.

fees.badge: Only {rate}% fee on winnings — cheaper than the big platforms
fees.note: A {rate}% fee applies to winnings only, at claim time.

profile.connectBody: Connect your wallet to see your profile, stats and betting history.
profile.copyHint: Click the address to copy it
profile.betsEmpty: No bets yet — head to the markets to get started.

notifications.closingBody: Betting closes in less than 1 hour: {question}
notifications.resolvedBody: A market you follow has been resolved: {question}
notifications.disputedBody: A market you follow has been disputed and awaits arbitration: {question}

resolution.actionBodyCreator: this market has ended. Propose a resolution — it will go through a dispute window before becoming final.
resolution.actionBodyAdmin: the creator hasn't proposed a resolution. As the contract owner, you can propose one on their behalf.
resolution.waitingCreator: Waiting for the creator to propose a resolution.
resolution.proposedBody: The creator proposed "{outcome}" as the outcome. Anyone can dispute it during the window below.
resolution.bondHint: Your bond is refunded if the dispute is upheld, or forfeited to the treasury if not.
resolution.disputedBody: {disputer} disputed the proposed outcome ("{outcome}") by locking {amount} USDC. The contract owner will make the final call.
resolution.waitingArbitration: Waiting for the contract owner to arbitrate this dispute.
resolution.waitingTimeoutReached: The owner never ruled on this dispute. Anyone can trigger a neutral refund below.
